copyWith method for creating modified copies while maintaining immutability
Methods that return new instances with updated state

gotchas_discovered.description: version field for conflict resolution but optional with nullable type

approach_outcome.implementation: Created comprehensive sync operation domain entities following established patterns
approach_outcome.efficiency: High - reused existing patterns from Profile entity and codebase conventions
approach_outcome.completeness: Complete - all acceptance criteria met with additional utility features

quality_metrics.testability: High - state-based methods with immutable entities
quality_metrics.maintainability: High - clear separation of concerns and comprehensive documentation
quality_metrics.extensibility: High - modular design allows easy addition of new operation types
quality_metrics.performance: Good - efficient state checking with computed properties
